positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical mystical woodland scene. The central focus is a glowing crescent moon framed by stylized forest silhouettes, including winding branches, detailed flora, and subtle, geometric occult elements. Incorporate elements of celestial mapping and luminous nebula constellation patterns. The style must be a mix of detailed linework, woodcut engraving, and modern mystical tattoo art. Utilize a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, midnight blue, and dramatic glowing accents in luminous gold and electric teal. The final output must feature clean, solid silhouettes, perfect for a centered, marketable apparel print. Vector art quality, strong linework.
